channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.117】Visual Studio 代码 1.117
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.117 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.117 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Azure SDK Release (April 2026)】Azure SDK 版本（2026 年 4 月）
item.description: 【Thank you for your interest in the new Azure SDKs! We release new features, improvements, and bug fixes every month. Subscribe to our Azure SDK Blog RSS Feed to get notified when a new release is available. You can find links to packages, code, and docs on our】感谢您对新的 Azure SDK 的兴趣！我们每月都会发布新功能、改进和错误修复。订阅我们的 Azure SDK 博客 RSS 源，以便在新版本可用时收到通知。您可以在我们的网站上找到包、代码和文档的链接

item.title: 【The Polyglot tax – Part 4】多语言税 – 第 4 部分
item.description: 【The Agent-Ready Database: Security, Backup, and MCP Part 4 of 4 – The Multi-Model Database Series This is the final post in a four-part series on multi-model databases in SQL Server 2025 and Azure SQL - exploring how the optimizer, storage engine, and security layer treat each data model as a first-class ci】代理就绪数据库：安全性、备份和 MCP 第 4 部分（共 4 部分）——多模型数据库系列 这是有关 SQL Server 2025 和 Azure SQL 中多模型数据库的四部分系列的最后一篇文章 - 探讨优化器、存储引擎和安全层如何将每个数据模型视为一流的 ci

item.title: 【.NET 10.0.7 Out-of-Band Security Update】.NET 10.0.7 带外安全更新
item.description: 【We are releasing .NET 10.0.7 as an out-of-band (OOB) update to address a security issue introduced in Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection Security update details This release includes a fix for】我们将 .NET 10.0.7 作为带外 (OOB) 更新发布，以解决 Microsoft.AspNetCore.DataProtection 中引入的安全问题 安全更新详细信息 此版本包含以下修复：

item.title: 【Announcing TypeScript 7.0 Beta】宣布推出 TypeScript 7.0 Beta
item.description: 【Today we are absolutely thrilled to announce the release of TypeScript 7.0 Beta! If you haven't been following TypeScript 7.0's development, this release is significant in that it is built on a completely new foundation. Over the past year, we have been porting the existing TypeScript codebase from TypeScript (as a bootstrapped codebase th】今天，我们非常高兴地宣布 TypeScript 7.0 Beta 发布！如果您还没有关注 TypeScript 7.0 的开发，那么这个版本的意义重大，因为它建立在全新的基础上。在过去的一年里，我们一直在从 TypeScript 移植现有的 TypeScript 代码库（作为引导代码库）

item.title: 【I Wasted 68 Minutes a Day Re-Explaining My Code. Then I Built auto-memory.】我每天浪费 68 分钟重新解释我的代码。然后我建立了自动记忆。
item.description: 【~1,900 lines of Python. Zero dependencies. Saves you an hour a day. GitHub → · pip install auto-memory Now give Copilot CLI enhanced context recall. Point it at】约 1,900 行 Python 代码。零依赖。每天为您节省一个小时。 GitHub → · pip install auto-memory 现在为 Copilot CLI 提供增强的上下文调用。将其指向

item.title: 【General Availability: Dynamic Data Masking for Azure Cosmos DB】正式发布：Azure Cosmos DB 的动态数据脱敏
item.description: 【Protecting sensitive data is a foundational requirement for modern applications. As organizations scale their use of Azure Cosmos DB across teams, environments, and workloads, controlling who can see sensitive information becomes increasingly important. Today, we are excited to announce the general availability of Dynamic Data Masking (DDM)】保护敏感数据是现代应用程序的基本要求。随着组织跨团队、环境和工作负载扩展 Azure Cosmos DB 的使用，控制谁可以查看敏感信息变得越来越重要。今天，我们很高兴地宣布动态数据脱敏 (DDM) 全面上市

item.title: 【Aspire 13.2: Bun Support and Container Enhancements】Aspire 13.2：Bun 支持和容器增强
item.description: 【If you've been following the JavaScript story in Aspire, 13.2 is the kind of release you want to see. Focused, deliberate, and packed with improvements that make a real difference. Bun support lands for Vite apps. Yarn gets more reliable. Container publishing becom】如果您一直在关注 Aspire 中的 JavaScript 故事，那么 13.2 就是您希望看到的版本。专注、深思熟虑，并进行了一系列能够带来真正改变的改进。 Bun 支持 Vite 应用程序。纱线变得更加可靠。容器发布成为

item.title: 【Sure, xor'ing a register with itself is the idiom for zeroing it out, but why not sub?】当然，将寄存器与自身进行异或是将其清零的习惯用法，但为什么不使用 sub 呢？
item.description: 【Matt Godbolt, probably best known for being the proprietor of Compiler Explorer, wrote a brief article on why x86 compilers love the xor eax, eax instruction.】Matt Godbolt（可能因 Compiler Explorer 的所有者而闻名）写了一篇简短的文章，介绍为什么 x86 编译器喜欢 xor eax、eax 指令。

item.title: 【Getting Started with Agentic DevOps – Part 1: Foundations】Agentic DevOps 入门 – 第 1 部分：基础
item.description: 【This post is the first in a 3-part series: Foundations (this post) Start shipping (context engineering, MCP servers, orchestration) App modernization (Java, .NET, PHP, microservices) Bookmark this post for quick reference as you start exploring Agentic DevOps. It will be updated as the 3 parts】这篇文章是由 3 部分组成的系列中的第一篇：基础（本文）开始交付（上下文工程、MCP 服务器、编排）应用程序现代化（Java、.NET、PHP、微服务）将此文章添加为书签，以便在您开始探索 Agentic DevOps 时快速参考。它将更新为3部分
